DeferredFeature.description:
A capability the pipeline knows about but does not yet implement.

Written to ``deferred.json`` on every run so that downstream consumers
(and humans reviewing output) can tell the difference between
"0 tables were emitted because there are none" and
"0 tables were emitted because the table extractor isn't built yet".

``observed_count`` is populated when a stage *saw* but intentionally
*skipped* something (e.g. images detected by the parser but not yet
emitted as diagram chunks). A non-zero value is a useful signal that
implementing the feature would materially change this document's
output. ``None`` means the run produced no signal either way.

description.description: One-sentence summary of what's not (yet) implemented.
description.title: Description

observed_count.description: If a stage detected candidate inputs but skipped them, the count goes here. ``None`` if the run had nothing to report.
observed_count.title: Observed Count

target_phase.description: Roadmap phase that will land this — e.g. 'Phase 5'.
target_phase.title: Target Phase

DeferredFeature.title: DeferredFeature

StageReport.description:
Summary of one stage's execution — written into the run log and into
``DocumentMeta.stage_reports``. Returned by every stage function.

ok.description: Whether the stage completed without errors.
ok.title: Ok

warnings.description: Non-fatal anomalies the stage flagged for human review.
warnings.title: Warnings

StageReport.title: StageReport

description:
Top-level run metadata written to ``document.json``.

Read this file first when reviewing a pipeline run — it carries the
document identity, the source-PDF and config hashes (which together
determine reproducibility), pipeline pass/fail, and per-stage reports.

block_count.description: Number of text blocks the pipeline emitted.
block_count.title: Block Count

chunk_count.description: Number of chunks the pipeline emitted. Legacy v0 field — always 0 in the post-wind-back default pipeline (chunking is deferred); preserved so downstream tools that pin against the v0 schema still load.
chunk_count.title: Chunk Count

config_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the canonical-JSON-serialised config used for this run.
config_sha256.title: Config Sha256

coordinate_convention.description: Convention for all bboxes in this run's output. Frozen at 'pdf_pt_top_left' (PDF points, top-left origin) for now.
coordinate_convention.title: Coordinate Convention

deferred_features.description: Capabilities not yet implemented. Mirrors ``deferred.json`` so reviewers see at a glance what isn't (yet) covered.
deferred_features.title: Deferred Features

edition.description: Which edition/year of the document this is.
edition.title: Edition

generated_at.description: UTC timestamp when the run finished.
generated_at.title: Generated At

git_sha.description: Git SHA of the regula source at run time, if available.
git_sha.title: Git Sha

page_count.description: Number of pages in the source PDF.
page_count.title: Page Count

parser_versions.description: Version of each parser used — e.g. {'docling': '2.0.1', 'pymupdf': '1.24.5'}.
parser_versions.title: Parser Versions

pipeline_passed.description: Did every stage complete and every validation threshold pass?
pipeline_passed.title: Pipeline Passed

source_pdf.description: Path to the source PDF (relative to repo root).
source_pdf.title: Source Pdf

source_pdf_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the source PDF bytes. Combined with config_sha256, determines whether a re-run is needed.
source_pdf_sha256.title: Source Pdf Sha256

stage_reports.description: One StageReport per executed stage, in execution order.
stage_reports.title: Stage Reports

title: DocumentMeta
